headline: Centene Q1 Earnings Beat Estimates on Rising Premiums, 2026 View Up

headline: Elevance Health (ELV) Positioned for Long-Term Margin Improvement Amid Medium-Term Challenges
summary: Hotchkis & Wiley, an investment management company, released its first-quarter 2026 investor letter for the “Hotchkis & Wiley Large Cap Fundamental Value Fund.” A copy of the letter can be downloaded here. In Q1 2026, the S&P 500 Index declined by -4.4%, driven by geopolitical uncertainty and AI investment themes. Brent crude oil surged over 100% […]

headline: JP Morgan Maintains Overweight on Elevance Health, Raises Price Target to $411
summary: JP Morgan  analyst Lisa Gill   maintains Elevance Health (NYSE:ELV) with a Overweight and raises the price target from $397 to $411.
